name: io.github.augiemazza/varrd
title: VARRD — Trading Edge Discovery
description: Institutional-grade quant research via MCP. 7 tools: research (multi-turn with 15 internal tools), autonomous_research (AI discovers edges), scan (live signals with exact trade levels), search (strategy lookup), get_hypothesis (full stats), check_balance, reset_session. 4 prompts. Covers 15,000+ instruments across futures, equities, crypto. Statistical guardrails enforced at infrastructure level.
